name: The Arc of Iowa
description: State chapter of The Arc promoting and protecting the rights of people with intellectual and developmental disabilities in Iowa.

name: Iowa Early ACCESS
description: Iowa's early intervention system providing services for infants and toddlers from birth to age 3 with developmental delays.

name: Special Olympics Iowa
description: Year-round sports training and competition for children and adults with intellectual disabilities across Iowa.

name: University of Iowa Stead Family Children's Hospital - Developmental Pediatrics
description: Comprehensive developmental and behavioral pediatric services at Iowa's premier children's hospital.

name: Disability Rights Iowa
description: Iowa's designated protection and advocacy organization providing legal services and advocacy for people with disabilities.
address: 666 Walnut St., Suite 1440, Des Moines, IA 50309

name: Iowa Program for Assistive Technology (IPAT)
description: Statewide assistive technology program providing device demonstrations, short-term loans, and information for Iowans with disabilities.

name: Iowa ABLE Savings Plan
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts for eligible Iowans with disabilities to save without jeopardizing public benefits.

name: Iowa Department of Health and Human Services - Disability Services
description: State agency providing disability services, Medicaid waivers, and supports for Iowans with disabilities.

name: Camp Courageous of Iowa
description: Year-round recreational and respite care camp for individuals with disabilities and special needs.

name: ASK Resource Center
description: Iowa's parent training and information center providing support and resources for families of children with disabilities.
address: 5665 Greendale Rd., Suite D, Johnston, IA 50131

name: Iowa Vocational Rehabilitation Services
description: State services helping Iowans with disabilities prepare for, find, and maintain competitive integrated employment.

name: Iowa Medicaid Home and Community-Based Services Waivers
description: Medicaid waiver programs providing home and community-based services to Iowans with disabilities as an alternative to institutional care.

name: ChildServe Therapy Services
description: Pediatric therapy services including occupational, physical, and speech therapy for children with special health care needs.

name: The Arc of East Central Iowa
description: Local Arc chapter providing advocacy, information and referral, respite care, and supported community living for individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities.

name: The Arc of Southeast Iowa
description: Founded in 1957, providing advocacy, respite care, and supported community living for children and adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities in Johnson and surrounding counties.
